front: What is the role of the microbiome in modulating anti-tumor immunity?
back: Gut microbiome affects checkpoint inhibitor efficacy. Akkermansia muciniphila, Faecalibacterium prausnitzii associated with response. Antibiotics reduce immunotherapy efficacy. Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) can convert non-responders. Mechanism: enhanced T cell priming in lymph nodes.
